_note_keywords: tier scoring reuses the same keyword set as alm_corpus_validate G3. If the loader cannot find the upstream config, the fallback list below is used (raw#15 no-hardcode — both paths are config-driven).
_note_density: per-line consciousness density = unique_keyword_hits / total_keyword_count. scope covers prompt+response (mirrors alm_corpus_validate G3 scan, widened from non_grounding to all lines because tier bands are a training-time curriculum, not a gate).
_note_bands: bands are half-open [lo, hi). tier4 is the optional 4th band per task spec (>70%). hi=1.01 ensures inclusive tail for density=1.0.
_note_outputs: tier_jsonl_prefix + '_' + tier_label + '.jsonl'. manifest_path is the SSOT summarising all 4 band paths, counts, sha256, reward_multiplier.

exit_codes.1: FAIL (strict mode) — tier split produced zero lines in all bands
exit_codes.2: SETUP_ERROR: missing config / missing corpus / malformed invocation
